policy.sameSegment: Beaches in the same curated shoreline segment should render the same visible exposure level unless a verified local morphology or wind-sport exception locks a stricter level.
policy.confidence: Segment propagation may support map-color consistency and medium review, but it never creates high confidence by itself.

segments.notes: Koloveloni and Petrousa are neighboring south-facing south Kythnos records; Agios Dimitrios is kept separate because west-wind map exposure differs.
Agios Nikolaos, Antonides, Nika, and Skylou are close southeast-facing southeast Kythnos records; dirt-road difficulty remains separately scored.
Agios Stefanos, Agkoritsa, Vasiliko, and Lagkousi are neighboring south-facing east-coast bay records; boat-only access remains a top-pick blocker where relevant.
Aosa, Zogkaki, and Kouri are close southeast-facing east Kythnos records with similar practical exposure behavior.
Agios Sostis, Kavourocheri, and Potamia are neighboring east-facing northeast Kythnos records; access remains separate.
Agia Irini and Maroula are nearby east-facing northeast Kythnos records; Skinari is kept outside because map-exposure validation shows a stricter local behavior.
Kaki Maria, Kalo Livadi, and Levkes are neighboring east-facing east Kythnos records with similar shoreline behavior.
Gaidouromantra, Markouli, and Si Mou Si are neighboring southeast-facing south/east Kythnos records; access difficulty remains separate.
Galazia Akti, Kastella, Pontikia, and Flampouria are west/northwest-facing west Kythnos records; individual access confidence remains separate.
Livadaki and Mikro Livadaki are adjacent northeast-facing records; difficult hiking access remains a top-pick blocker.
